narrative:
Trenton 8 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,392 registered voters, with 61.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.6 percentage points.
